name: Nuclear Winter
description:
"Welcome to the Post-Apocalypse!"

You'll be surviving in a world that's been destroyed by nuclear war and covered in eternal winter.
You'll need to gather resources, make alliances, and uncover the secrets of what happened in the past to survive.

The world is full of hostile factions, radiation zones, and mutant creatures.
You'll have to fight to stay alive and build a new world from the ashes.

You'll face the challenges of hunger, thirst, cold, and radiation as you navigate dangerous environments.
Can you survive and become the hero of this new world?

This version of the game lacks status effects, inventory, and other features. If you want to try a more complex version, I recommend starting with the first part.

I'd be really grateful if you could leave feedback on the bot.💕
creator: BruniikBron
